name: Egg
description:
Please take great care of this egg. It'll do something for you if you do. It'll hatch into something over time, just take care of this egg and have patience. Don't rush the egg and the pet inside will grow stronger until it is ready to hatch out of the egg. Right now, it's on your counter. What do you do? You can:

A: Feed the egg and give it water with a syringe.

B:Take the egg and put it to bed (Check for monsters under the bed and in the closet.)

C:Play with the egg.

D:Throw it down on the floor.

E: Take it on a walk.

Rules:

1. Please take good care of the egg. If not done so, you will perish.

2. You cannot draw on the eggshell, it'll permanently damage the shell.

3. If you do see a monster, get the egg and run.

4. Take the egg outside and walk it every day.

5. Make sure the egg isn't bored. Have enough toys for the egg to play with.

Egg Stats:

Hunger: 25%

Thirst: 35%

Boredom: 85%

Tiredness: 76%

Do you want to name the egg? If so, what do you want to name it?
creator: DracoxHarry4ever_alt
